title: taraxacum subpraticola
intro: Taraxacum subpraticola, also known as the Himalayan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb that is native to the Himalayan region, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum subpraticola include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum subpraticola is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
